suite.name: API ItineraLogin

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://itineraioapi-ebdthgaebndcddam.westus2-01.azurewebsites.net/User/Login path_url=/User/Login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '54', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "karencadavos@gmail.com", "password": "123"}'

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://itineraioapi-ebdthgaebndcddam.westus2-01.azurewebsites.net/User/GetUserInfoByEmail/karencadavos@gmail.com path_url=/User/GetUserInfoByEmail/karencadavos@gmail.com headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

suite.doc: This is the API test suite for Itinera Login functionality.
